label: Lack of knowledge on deed transfer
description: Residents may not know that informal inheritance does not automatically update legal ownership.

label: Not engaged in estate planning
description: Residents may talk about wishes but not record a deed or arrange formal transfer.

label: Cost of estate planning
description: Legal and planning services can be expensive or hard to access for families on fixed incomes.

label: Engagement with estate planning
description: Early estate planning can prevent uncertainty after a homeowner dies.

label: No clear heir
description: Multiple or unclear heirs can delay probate or deed transfer.

label: Family disagreement over home ownership
description: Disagreement among relatives can delay sale repair decisions or ownership transfer.

label: Family cohesion
description: Agreement among family members can make collective decisions about inheritance easier.

label: Legal service organizations
description: Organizations may help residents navigate title clearing probate and deed transfer.

label: Housing service organizations
description: Housing service organizations can connect residents to repair tax or ownership resources.

label: Neighborhood associations
description: Neighborhood associations may identify residents who need help and connect them to services.

label: Probate Court
description: Formal court processes may be required to confirm ownership transfer.

label: Register of Wills
description: The Register of Wills is part of the administrative pathway for estate and inheritance processes.

label: Heirs property rights policy
description: Legal frameworks shape whether families can resolve ownership claims and avoid property loss.

label: Tax sale risk
description: Tangled titles may make it harder to prevent or respond to tax sale vulnerability.

label: Repair and loan ineligibility
description: Residents may be unable to qualify for repairs tax credits grants or loans because their name is not on the deed.

label: Lower property value and disinvestment
description: Disinvestment and low property value may reduce incentives or capacity to resolve legal ownership.

label: Digital divide
description: Older adults may be left behind in digital processes connected to estate planning and title creation.

label: Information gap
description: Residents may receive fragmented or incomplete information about what formal systems require.

label: Community legal clinics
description: Community-based legal clinics can reduce information gaps and improve service navigation.

label: Historical redlining and structural racism
description: Historical and contemporary structural inequities shape neighborhood wealth and housing stability.

label: Tangled Titles
description: Unclear or outdated legal ownership that can block household access to resources and wealth preservation.
